narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive investment in semiconductor hardware and memory is driving record highs across the chip sector.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Positive clinical trial results for next-generation weight-loss drugs are driving momentum in the pharmaceutical sector.

narratives.name: Resurgent Inflation Volatility
narratives.thesis: Hotter-than-expected inflation data is creating significant headwinds for broader equity indices and treasury markets.

narratives.name: AI Software Integration
narratives.thesis: Major tech companies are seeing momentum as they integrate generative AI into their core software and cloud platforms.

narratives.name: China Geopolitical Shifts
narratives.thesis: Upcoming trade summits and regional political developments are creating volatility for companies with significant China exposure.

narratives.name: Geopolitical Energy Tensions
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical instability in the Middle East is creating supply concerns that support energy prices and producers.
